title: NodeBinding
description: Install-time or enrollment-time mutable assignment for a node booting a shared OS image.

specVersion.description: Spec version of this document, e.g. "2.1.0".

imageRef.description: URN reference to the immutable OSImage applied to the node.

nodeProfile.description: Install-time node persona or profile selected for this node.

topology.description: Topology identifier such as a region, site, or cell code.

fleet.description: Fleet or rollout group name to which the node belongs.

updateRing.description: Update ring used for image selection and promotion.

targetImgref.description: Optional explicit runtime image reference overriding the source install image reference.

hostnameTemplate.description: Optional hostname template used during install or first boot.

registries.description: Optional list of registry mirrors or pull sources.

bootstrapTrustRootRefs.description: Optional list of trust-root references used during bootstrap or enrollment.

installerProfile.description: Optional installer profile or preset selected by the operator.

notes.description: Free-form operational notes for the binding.
